metadata.name: maisaedu-poormans-dms
metadata.summary: A library for making database migration tasks, for +A Education

class_variables.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.redshift_dynamo_migration.models.Struct.Struct.s3_url
documentation: S3 URL for the full load

class_variables.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.redshift_dynamo_migration.models.Struct.Struct.database
documentation: Database name, used to build the table names in the queries

class_variables.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.redshift_dynamo_migration.models.Struct.Struct.source_schema
documentation: Schema where the MVW is

class_variables.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.redshift_dynamo_migration.models.Struct.Struct.source_table
documentation: DynamoDB table name

class_variables.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.redshift_dynamo_migration.models.Struct.Struct.incremental_interval_delta
documentation: Interval in seconds to consider for incremental loads

modules.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms
documentation:
A library for making database migration tasks. This library is intended to be used in situations
where AWS's DMS cannot be used, for any reason.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.execute_once
documentation: Executes a parametrized query in a pool once and streams the rows.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.execute_statement_once
documentation: Executes a not parameterized statement in the pool once, expecting no results.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.adapt_patched
documentation: Transforms a thing into SQL code. This is a patch of `psycopg2.extensions.adapt`.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.field_list
documentation: Gets a list of columns and joins them with commas in between.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.update_list
documentation:
Renders the `DO UPDATE SET` clause of an `INSERT INTO` statement, setting all rows to be
updated with new values.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.typed_field_list
documentation: Renders the field list of a `CREATE TABLE` statement.

classes.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.load_table_info
documentation: Loads table info from the source database.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.load_last_point
documentation:
Loads the last point where the migration ended, according to this `Migration`'s
`period_column`. This method raises an assertion error if `period_column` is not set.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.create_table
documentation: Creates the table in the destination database, if it not exists.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.drop_table_if_exists
documentation: Drops the table in the destination database, if it exists.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.source
documentation: The task responsible for getting rows from the source database.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.sink
documentation: The task responsible for putting rows in the destination database.

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.startup
documentation: Does migration setup

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migration.migrate
documentation: Runs migration _after_ setup.

Does the migration of a single table from one database to the other.

Parameters:
    table_name: the name of the table to be migrated.
    batch_size (=1_000): the size of each migration batch.
    queue_max_size (=1_000): the size of the migration queue.
    schema (="public"): the schema of the table to be migrated.
    where (="true"): WHERE-clause to filter the rows to be migrated.
    period_column (=None): a column to be used as "time" in order to make incremental loads.
    primary_key (=None): PK column. As a fallback, load_table_info will use a query to
        retrieve the PK column.
    table_name_transform (=IDENTITY): a function transforming the name of the table in the
        source database to the name of the table in the target database.
    column_name_transform (=IDENTITY): a function transforming the name of each column in the
        source database to the name of each column in the target database.
    schema_name_transform (=IDENTITY): a function transforming the name of the schema in the
        source database to the name of the schema in the target database.

classes.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migrator

methods.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.Migrator.migrate
documentation: Runs a list of migrations.
Manages the overall migrations from a source database to a destination database.

functions.name: maisaedu_poormans_dms.sql_server_migration.data_type_treatment
documentation: https://www.sqlines.com/sql-server-to-postgresql
